overall.description: Static first-person view of the Gryffindor common room from the video game Hogwarts Legacy. The medieval-style lounge features a burning stone fireplace, red tapestries, wooden balconies, and students in wizard robes periodically walking through the warm, fire-lit interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gryffindor common room with central fireplace and seating areas

events.description: student in dark robes exits the frame to the right after walking across the room
second student enters from the background archway and walks toward the right
third student walks across the room from the background archway to the right exit

agents.ego_description: standing still near the fireplace, observing the common room and other students passing through

notable_agents.action: student in dark wizard robes walking from the background toward the right side of the room
student sitting on the red sofa reading or relaxing throughout the clip

entered.detail: large medieval stone fireplace with active fire burning inside, serving as the room's focal point
burgundy red wall covered with tapestries and climbing plants, featuring a framed painting
upper level wooden balcony with railings overlooking the common room floor
medieval-style iron chandelier with multiple hanging lights suspended from the ceiling
plush red velvet sofa with wooden trim where a student is seated
portrait painting in a gold frame hanging on the stone wall near the archway
vintage brass floor lamp with a green lampshade next to an armchair

segments.scene_description: A static view of the Gryffindor common room from Hogwarts Legacy, showing the warm, fire-lit interior with medieval stone architecture and red tapestries. Throughout the minute-long clip, various students in wizard robes walk through the room from the background archway toward the right exit, while one student remains seated on the red velvet sofa in the foreground. The camera remains stationary, capturing the ambient activity of the common room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, first-person perspective of the Gryffindor common room, capturing the rhythmic flow of student activity within a warm, medieval interior. It begins with a static view of the fire-lit space, where the glow of the hearth illuminates stone architecture and rich red tapestries. As the scene unfolds, students in wizard robes emerge from a background archway and traverse the room toward a right-hand exit. This ambient movement continues around a student who remains seated on a red velvet sofa in the foreground, grounding the composition. The camera remains fixed throughout, allowing the shifting patterns of the students to define the living atmosphere of the lounge.
